title: Waypoint Block
description: A simple datapack/mod that adds a waypoint block that uses the player locator bar.
body:
# Waypoint Block

![An image of a waypoint block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82c00d149d589ad281ad416d5ae5a0a234ead703.png)

---

This datapack (or mod) adds placeable blocks that show markers on the player locator bar, no texture pack required!

---
## Crafting
![The crafting recipe of a waypoint block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6348b7ff2acb02e606906d5e713ce57052c336e.png)
